mapper.select: SELECT ps.PLACE_ID , ps.WS_ID , ps.SOURCE_URL , ps.THUMBNAIL_URL , ps.TITLE , ps.DESCRIPTION , ps.CATEGORY , COUNT(v.USER_ID) AS VOTE_COUNT , IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN v.USER_ID = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS VOTED_BY_ME FROM PLACE_SUGGESTION ps LEFT JOIN PLACE_SUGGESTION_VOTE v ON v.PLACE_ID = ps.PLACE_ID WHERE ps.WS_ID = #{workspaceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ps.PLANNER_ID = #{plannerId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY ps.PLACE_ID, ps.WS_ID, ps.SOURCE_URL, ps.THUMBNAIL_URL, ps.TITLE, ps.DESCRIPTION, ps.CATEGORY ORDER BY ps.REGIST_DT DESC

SELECT ps.PLACE_ID , ps.WS_ID , ps.SOURCE_URL , ps.THUMBNAIL_URL , ps.TITLE , ps.DESCRIPTION , ps.CATEGORY , COUNT(v.USER_ID) AS VOTE_COUNT , IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN v.USER_ID = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS VOTED_BY_ME FROM PLACE_SUGGESTION ps LEFT JOIN PLACE_SUGGESTION_VOTE v ON v.PLACE_ID = ps.PLACE_ID WHERE ps.PLACE_ID = #{placeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY ps.PLACE_ID, ps.WS_ID, ps.SOURCE_URL, ps.THUMBNAIL_URL, ps.TITLE, ps.DESCRIPTION, ps.CATEGORY
